title: Creamy Russian Cabbage Stew
description: A mustardy, silky stew of savoy cabbage simmered in oat milk and broth, finished with a touch of spice for a monsoon‑sized Russian comfort dish.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat until shimmering.
Add chopped cabbage and sauté for 5 minutes until it begins to wilt.
Stir in golden mustard, ground ginger, and turmeric, cooking for 1 minute to release aromas.
Pour in vegetable broth, bring to a gentle boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
Stir in oat milk and continue simmering until the stew thickens, about 5 minutes.
Season with salt, taste, and adjust if needed.
Remove from heat and let it sit for 5 minutes to set its silky texture.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh dill and a drizzle of olive oil if desired.
